research: Game Plan 1A — intraday-momentum (morning_sign) gate on bearish-continuation
feature: morning_sign = sign(open[first RTH bar] -> close[last bar <=10:00 ET]); arms partition the SAME real-fill universe by that sign.

verdict.BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING_ATM: HELPS — DOWN-gating raises full-window real-fills expectancy AND preserves/raises OP-16 anchor edge_capture AND beats the inverse (signal, not noise). DOWN-gate exp $22.83 (N=42) vs baseline exp $-21.58 (N=69): delta $44.41. Anchor edge_capture DOWN $134.4 vs baseline $134.4: delta $0.0. Inverse(UP) exp $-90.66.
verdict.BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING_ITM2: HELPS — DOWN-gating raises full-window real-fills expectancy AND preserves/raises OP-16 anchor edge_capture AND beats the inverse (signal, not noise). DOWN-gate exp $-1.3 (N=33) vs baseline exp $-51.4 (N=62): delta $50.1. Anchor edge_capture DOWN $197.4 vs baseline $197.4: delta $0.0. Inverse(UP) exp $-108.41.

op20_disclosures.authority: Real-fills (simulator_real over OPRA, valid ~through 2026-05-29) is the WR/expectancy authority. Arms are PARTITIONS of one fill set (same sim), so deltas isolate the gate, not re-simulation noise.
op20_disclosures.levels: Historically-rebuilt ★★ proxies (active+multi_day _detect_from_history), NOT production ★★★. Break/ribbon logic uses clean ctx.prior_bars (no look-ahead).
op20_disclosures.morning_sign: Derived from the SPY 5m frame itself (open->10:00 ET); causal (known by 10:00, before the bearish-continuation entries it gates, which fire 09:35-12:00). FLAT/None-sign days excluded from all arms.
op20_disclosures.anchor_metric: OP-16 edge_capture computed on REAL fills per arm: sum(P&L on WIN anchors) - sum(max(0,-P&L) on LOSS anchors). PRIMARY gate; small-n (lesson C24).
op20_disclosures.dsr: Advisory only — n is far below MIN_RELIABLE_OBS=20 on the gated arms (low_power=True). Never a hard gate at this n (lesson C24).
op20_disclosures.chart_stop: premium_stop_pct=-0.99 (chart-stop only) per L51/L55. Puts, qty=3, ATM+ITM2.
